XGAME_FIND_DATA

The XGAME_FIND_DATA structure describes a save game found by the XFindFirstSaveGame or XFindNextSaveGame function.

typedef struct _XGAME_FIND_DATA {
    WIN32_FIND_DATA wfd;
    CHAR szSaveGameDirectory[MAX_PATH];
    WCHAR szSaveGameName[MAX_GAMENAME];
} XGAME_FIND_DATA, *PXGAME_FIND_DATA;

Members

wfd
Specifies file-system information concerning the directory of the save game. For more information, see WIN32_FIND_DATA.
szSaveGameDirectory[MAX_PATH]
A null-terminated string that is the directory path of the found save game.
szSaveGameName[MAX_GAMENAME]
A null-terminated string that is the name of the found save game.

Remarks

The directory returned in szSaveGameDirectory is the directory that contains the data and metadata files with the information representing the saved game.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xbox.h, for include use Xtl.h.
Import Library: Use Xapilib.lib
Unicode: The structure contains both Unicode and ANSI members.

See Also

XFindFirstSaveGame, XFindNextSaveGame, XFindClose, XCreateSaveGame, XDeleteSaveGame, WIN32_FIND_DATA
